JUDGE BARBARA MATTHEWS, IN PRO-PER BABUBHAI PATEL, IN PRO-PER JAMES AVERY CARTER, IN PRO-PER 2:40 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT. FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES. DEFT. TO VACATE THE PREMISES BY 05/31/94; PLTF. WAIVES ANY BACK RENT & DAMAGES. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT FORMS
